description: Shot type → framing + preferred approved ref aliases (community: pick right ref TYPE). Used by shot_compose.py

establishing.framing: wide establishing, environment first, no hero character or tiny figures only
establishing.i2v_hint: slow camera drift or gentle push-in, environment only, no new people

wide.framing: wide full-body in set, readable environment, character fully visible head-to-toe, headroom and feet in frame
wide.i2v_hint: subtle body motion, ambient room life, keep identity and wardrobe fixed

medium.framing: medium shot waist-up, head and torso both in frame with headroom, environment readable behind, not face-only close-up
medium.i2v_hint: subtle head and shoulder motion, natural blink, camera locked or micro move

closeup.framing: close-up face, shallow depth of field, set softly behind
closeup.i2v_hint: micro facial motion only, eyes soft, do not invent new face identity

insert.framing: insert detail of prop or landmark, no face required
insert.i2v_hint: slow detail move or light shift on object only

pov.framing: point-of-view subjective frame, hands or prop edge optional
